x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Payment Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to transfer funds from an account to a beneficiary to fulfill a payment obligation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request (usually pre-authorized) allowing a third party to collect funds from an account on agreed dates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Withdrawal Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to withdraw cash from an account (e.g., ATM or over-the-counter).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Card Transaction Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to debit funds from an account following a card-based purchase or transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Debit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to deduct fees (e.g., maintenance, service, penalty fees) from an account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Debit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to deduct taxes or statutory charges from an account as per applicable regulations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Order Debit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to execute recurring payments of a fixed amount at predefined intervals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Authorization Hold Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to temporarily block or earmark funds (e.g., pre-authorization for card transactions).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Transfer Debit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to move funds from one account to another within the same institution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Debit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to debit funds to reverse a previously credited transaction (e.g., corrections, chargebacks).
